OCR Platform
DashboardUploadAnalytics

Upload PDF Files

Drag and drop your PDF files or click to browse. All files will be converted to high-quality text using advanced OCR.

Job Details

Drag PDF files here, or click to select

Supports multiple PDF files up to 50MB each

Processing Information

  • • Files are converted to high-quality PNGs at 300 DPI
  • • OCR uses Google Lens technology for maximum accuracy
  • • Supports multiple languages including Hindi, Gujarati, and English
  • • Processing time: ~5 seconds per PDF page
  • • All files are processed securely and can be deleted after completion
